2605.17669.title: Multimodal Cultural Heritage Knowledge Graph Extension with Language and Vision Models
2605.17669.paper_summary: The preservation and interpretation of cultural heritage increasingly rely on digital technologies, among which Knowledge Graphs (KGs) stand out for their ability to structure vast amounts of data. However, the construction and expansion of these KGs often face challenges due to the diverse and complex nature of cultural heritage information. In this paper, we propose a novel approach for extending KG resources in the domain of cultural heritage, which we applied to French data. First, we introduce a new knowledge graph in the domain of French cultural heritage, WJoconde, which is distinguished by its multimodality as it integrates both textual and image information of the entities. We further introduce three variants of WJoconde to facilitate downstream research, such as Knowledge Graph Completion (KGC). We also built a comprehensive benchmark for KGC methods on our dataset. Second, we propose a new framework for extending cultural heritage KGs using multi-modal approaches leveraging Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision-Language Models (VLMs), which includes automated data extraction from unstructured resources combined with a special validation pipeline for grounding the output of both models, to further extend WJoconde. Our results show that by integrating the rich text and image information in cultural heritage data, we can efficiently enhance KGs with high reliability. We open-source all code and benchmark datasets with text and images, as well as the original data with an interactive access point
2605.17669.paper_summary_zh: 文化遺產的保存和詮釋越來越依賴數位技術，其中知識圖譜（KGs）因其結構化大量數據的能力而脫穎而出。<lb/>然而，這些KG的建設和擴展常常面臨挑戰，因為文化遺產資訊的多樣性和複雜性。<lb/>在本文中，我們提出了一種新的方法，用於擴展文化遺產領域的KG資源，我們將其應用於法國數據。<lb/>首先，我們介紹了一個新的法國文化遺產知識圖譜WJoconde，其特點在於其多模態性，因為它整合了實體的文本和圖像資訊。<lb/>我們進一步介紹了WJoconde的三個變體，以促進下游研究，例如知識圖譜補全（KGC）。<lb/>我們還為我們的數據集建立了一個全面的KGC方法基準。<lb/>其次，我們提出了一個新的框架，用於利用大型語言模型（LLMs）和視覺-語言模型（VLMs）的多模態方法擴展文化遺產KG，該框架包括從非結構化資源自動提取數據，並結合一個特殊的驗證管道來基於兩個模型的輸出進行基準，進一步擴展WJoconde。<lb/>我們的結果顯示，通過整合文化遺產數據中的豐富文本和圖像資訊，我們可以有效地增強KG，並具有高可靠性。<lb/>我們將所有代碼和基準數據集（包括文本和圖像）以及具有互動訪問點的原始數據開源。
2605.17669.author: Yang Zhang et.al.
2605.17669.authors: Yang Zhang, Nada Mimouni, Jean-Claude Moissinac, Fayçal Hamdi
